title: Create a barber with working hours so they become available for scheduling
description: Admin can create a new barber with defined working hours and the barber appears as active in the barbers list.

steps.description: Fill in the username or email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in a unique barber name
Set working hours to valid open and close times for at least one day
Verify the new barber appears in the barbers list as active

title: Create a client record so reception can book appointments for them
description: Staff can create a new client with name and phone and the client appears in the clients list with an empty visit history.

steps.description: Fill in the username or email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in a unique client name
Fill in a valid phone number
Verify the new client appears in the clients list
Verify the client shows an empty state for visit history

title: Create a service so it can be used during appointment booking
description: Staff can create a new service with name, duration, and price and the service appears in the services list.

steps.description: Fill in the username or email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in a unique service name
Fill in a valid service price
Verify the new service appears in the services list

title: Open a conversation thread and audit messages and actions
description: Verifies an authenticated admin can open a conversation and see message history along with recorded action events such as client creation and appointment creation.

steps.description: Open the inbox from the main navigation
Open the most recent conversation thread
Verify the conversation displays a chronological message history
Verify recorded action events are displayed with metadata (for example client creation or appointment creation)

title: Update a barber’s working hours and status so availability rules can change
description: Admin can edit an existing barber to change working hours or active status and the updates are reflected in the barber details/list.

steps.description: Fill in the username or email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in a unique barber name
Set working hours to valid open and close times for at least one day
Change the barber status to deactivated
Adjust the working hours to a different valid range
Verify the barber is shown as deactivated and the updated working hours are displayed

title: Search clients by phone or name to quickly find the right record
description: Staff can search by phone or name and open a matching client to view visit and spending history.

steps.description: Fill in the username or email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in a unique client name
Fill in a valid phone number
Fill the clients search field with the client phone number or name
Open the matching client from the results
Verify visit and spending history sections are visible

title: Review recent WhatsApp conversations in inbox
description: Verifies an authenticated admin can open the inbox and view a list of recent conversation threads with identifying metadata such as phone and timestamps.

steps.description: Open the inbox from the main navigation
Verify a list of conversation threads is displayed
Verify each displayed conversation thread shows identifying metadata such as phone and a timestamp

title: Edit an existing service to keep price and duration accurate
description: Staff can edit a service’s price or duration and the updated details are shown in the services list or service detail view.

steps.description: Fill in the username or email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in a unique service name
Fill in a valid service price
Open the newly created service for editing
Change the service duration to a different valid duration
Change the service price to a different valid price
Verify the updated service details are displayed

title: Search conversations by phone and open a matching result
description: Verifies an authenticated admin can search conversation logs by phone and open a result that matches the search criteria.

steps.description: Open the inbox from the main navigation
Fill a phone number fragment into the conversation search field
Open the first conversation in the search results
Verify the opened conversation is associated with the searched phone number

title: Filter conversations by date range and open a filtered thread
description: Verifies an authenticated admin can filter conversation logs by date and open a conversation that appears within the filtered results.

steps.description: Open the inbox from the main navigation
Select a valid start date in the date filter
Select a valid end date in the date filter
Open the first conversation in the filtered results
Verify the opened conversation shows message timestamps within the selected date range

title: Clear applied filters to restore full conversation list
description: Verifies an authenticated admin can clear inbox search/filters and return to the unfiltered conversation list.

steps.description: Open the inbox from the main navigation
Fill a phone number fragment into the conversation search field
Verify the conversation list is restored to the default unfiltered state

title: Validate required fields when creating a barber to prevent incomplete profiles
description: Admin cannot save a new barber when required fields are empty and sees validation errors for missing inputs.

steps.description: Fill in the username or email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the barber form with required fields left empty
Verify required-field validation errors are displayed

title: View empty state when no conversations match filters
description: Verifies the inbox shows a clear empty state when a user applies filters that yield no matching conversation threads.

steps.description: Open the inbox from the main navigation
Fill an unlikely phone number fragment into the conversation search field
Verify an empty state is displayed indicating no conversations match the current criteria
